mapper.sql: id, uploadid, lastruntime, scriptname, threads, `label`, samples, ko, error, average, `min`, `max`, median, thpct90, thpct95, thpct99, throughput, received, sent, ip, starttime, endtime, jtlpath, indexpath, `state`
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( select * from jmeter_perfor_current_report )t WHERE uploadid = #{uploadid,jdbcType=INTEGER}
AND lastruntime LIKE CONCAT('%', #{lastruntime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
mapper.update: update jmeter_perfor_current_report set lastruntime = #{lastruntime,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM jmeter_perfor_current_report order by starttime asc
mapper.insert: insert into jmeter_perfor_current_report (uploadid, lastruntime, scriptname, threads, `label`, samples, ko, error, average, `min`, `max`, median, thpct90, thpct95, thpct99, throughput, received, sent, ip, starttime, endtime, jtlpath, indexpath, `state` ) values ( #{uploadid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{lastruntime,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{scriptname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{threads,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{label,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{samples,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ko,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{error,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{average,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{min,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{max,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{median,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thpct90,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thpct95,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thpct99,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{throughput,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{received,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{starttime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jtlpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{indexpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER} )

insert into jmeter_perfor_current_report
id,
uploadid,
lastruntime,
scriptname,
threads,
`label`,
samples,
ko,
error,
average,
`min`,
`max`,
median,
thpct90,
thpct95,
thpct99,
throughput,
received,
sent,
ip,
starttime,
endtime,
jtlpath,
indexpath,
`state`,

mapper.update:
update jmeter_perfor_current_report
uploadid = #{uploadid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
lastruntime = #{lastruntime,jdbcType=CHAR},
scriptname = #{scriptname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
threads = #{threads,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`label` = #{label,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
samples = #{samples,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ko = #{ko,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
error = #{error,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
average = #{average,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`min` = #{min,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`max` = #{max,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
median = #{median,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
thpct90 = #{thpct90,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
thpct95 = #{thpct95,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
thpct99 = #{thpct99,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
throughput = #{throughput,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
received = #{received,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sent = #{sent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ip = #{ip,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
starttime = #{starttime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
endtime = #{endtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
jtlpath = #{jtlpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
indexpath = #{indexpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`state` = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update jmeter_perfor_current_report set uploadid = #{uploadid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, lastruntime = #{lastruntime,jdbcType=CHAR}, scriptname = #{scriptname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, threads = #{threads,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `label` = #{label,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, samples = #{samples,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ko = #{ko,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, error = #{error,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, average = #{average,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `min` = #{min,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `max` = #{max,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, median = #{median,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, thpct90 = #{thpct90,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, thpct95 = #{thpct95,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, thpct99 = #{thpct99,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, throughput = #{throughput,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, received = #{received,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sent = #{sent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ip = #{ip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, starttime = #{starttime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, endtime = #{endtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jtlpath = #{jtlpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, indexpath = #{indexpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `state` = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
